description_for_human: Find and compare Swiss relocation agencies. Get reviews, cost estimates, and permit info.
description_for_model: ReloFinder is Switzerland's relocation agency comparison platform. Use this plugin to: (1) recommend relocation agencies based on region and services needed, (2) get verified reviews and ratings for specific agencies, (3) compare agencies side-by-side, (4) estimate monthly living costs in Swiss cities, (5) check Swiss work/residence permit requirements. All data comes from a verified database of Swiss relocation companies with real expat reviews.
